images.caption: Bar chart of p95 inference latency benchmarks (ResNet-50 INT8, batch 1) for the VoltEdge Nano, VoltEdge Pro, and VoltEdge Max appliances. The per-variant latency values in milliseconds are shown in the figure.
Pie chart of the Kestrel Systems Q3 2025 revenue mix, showing the percentage share contributed by VoltEdge Pro, VoltEdge Max, VoltEdge Nano, and Services.
Line chart of VoltEdge fleet GPU utilization over a 24-hour sample, annotated with the daily peak and trough utilization percentages and the hours at which they occur.
Block diagram of the VoltEdge streaming inference pipeline showing the ordered stages and message flow from the camera array through to the operations dashboard.
Grouped bar chart comparing stream error rate percentages on firmware 2.3 versus firmware 2.4 for each VoltEdge variant (Nano, Pro, Max).
